info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-01-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Get all object types in an account.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read`

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`namespace`: `equals`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ULID ID of the object type.

schema.description: The ULID ID of the object type.

id.description: The ID of the schema property. Must be a postive integer.

name.description: The name of the schema property

type.description: The type of the schema property

description.description: The description of the schema property

id.description: Property ID. Must be a positive integer.

value.description: Constant value assigned to every record

id_path.description: JSONPath data selector to owning ID

related_id_path.description: JSONPath data selector to related ID

update_strategy.description: Strategy for updating relationships with each new RawDataRecord ingestion

status.description: The status of this object schema

required.description: Properties that are required on the object schema

source-mapping.description: The source mapping to create with this object schema

id.description: The ULID ID of the object schema
The ULID ID of the object schema
A compound ID uniquely identifying this relationship, in the format 'profile:::{relationship_name}'.
The compound ID of the object record, formatted as object_type_id:::object_record_id
The ULID ID of the object schema
A compound ID uniquely identifying this relationship, in the format '{related_object_type_id}:::{relationship_name}'.
The compound ID of the object record, formatted as object_type_id:::object_record_id

record_properties.description: The properties of this object record as defined by the object schema

id.description: The ULID ID of the object schema

title.description: The title for this object schema

description.description: The description of this object schema

status.description: The status of this object schema

required.description: Properties that are required on the object schema

published_at.description: The datetime when this object schema was activated

visibility.description: The datetime when this object schema was updated

id.description: The source mapping for this object schema
The object schema relationships for this object schema
The profile object schema relationships for this object schema

title.description: The title for this object type. Note that this title moves in lockstep with the associated object-schema title.

description.description: The description of this object type. Note that this description moves in lockstep with the associated object-schema description.

visibility.description: The visibility of this object type

namespace.description: The namespace of this object type

object-schema.description: The object schema to create with this object type

id.description: The ULID ID of the object type

title.description: The title for this object type

description.description: The description of this object type

status.description: The status of the schema associated with this object type

namespace.description: The namespace of this object type

created_at.description: The date and time when this object type was created

updated_at.description: The date and time when this object type was last updated

id.description: The current active schema for this object type
The draft schema for this object type, if one exists
All schema versions for this object type

related_id_paths.description: List of profile identifier mappings to JSONPath data selectors

update_strategy.description: Strategy for updating relationships with each new RawDataRecord ingestion

path.description: JSONPath data selector to related ID

id.description: Property ID

property_mappings.description: A mapping of source property IDs to source mappings

relationship_mappings.description: A mapping of source relationship IDs to source mappings

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
